processorFamily: Unspecified processor statement with clear fee sections
fixturePurpose: Warning case for the phase-1 two-bucket evaluator using explicit section subtotals.
method: Card-brand total is the sum of explicit interchange/program and card-brand sections. Processor-owned total is the sum of authorization, transaction, and other-fee sections.

evidence.text: Total Interchange Fees/American Express Program Fees:$35.07

notes: This fixture is intentionally outside the guide baseline: card-brand share is below 60% and processor-owned share is above 40%.
The statement sections are clean enough that phase 1 can assert the two-bucket split directly from section subtotals.
This fixture could support later sub-bucket assertions because the processor-owned sections are explicit.
